name: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (SAA-C03)
description: Associate-level certification for individuals who design distributed systems on AWS. Validates ability to design solutions that are secure, resilient, high-performing, and cost-optimized. 1+ years of hands-on experience recommended. 65 questions, 130 minutes, 720/1000 passing score.
exportIntroQuestions:
## About this document

This document is a collection of practice exam questions for the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (SAA-C03)** certification. The questions were selected because they represent realistic architectural scenarios commonly encountered when designing distributed systems on AWS.

### Certification context

This certification validates the ability to design well-architected solutions on AWS, including topics such as:

* Designing secure access to AWS resources and workloads
* Designing scalable, highly available, and fault-tolerant architectures
* Selecting high-performing compute, storage, database, and networking solutions
* Designing cost-optimized architectures that balance performance and budget
* Applying the AWS Well-Architected Framework principles

### About the questions

Each question in this document is independent and should be analyzed as a standalone scenario. Practice exams intentionally present isolated situations, and questions may appear in any order during the actual certification exam. Information from one question should never be assumed to apply to another.

For each scenario, this document includes:

* The original practice exam question.
* An explanation of the architectural reasoning behind the correct answer.
* A discussion of why the remaining options are less appropriate for the stated requirements.

### Learning objective

The primary goal of this material is to develop architectural reasoning rather than memorization. The focus should be on understanding the business and technical requirements presented in each scenario, identifying the AWS services and design patterns that best satisfy those requirements, and recognizing the trade-offs that make one solution more appropriate than the alternatives.

By studying the decision-making process behind each answer, readers can build the analytical skills expected for the AWS certification exam.
exportIntroTranscripts:
## About this document

This document contains technical summaries of lesson transcripts related to the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (SAA-C03)** certification.

### Purpose
Organizes and synthesizes lesson content in a structured format for quick review and deeper understanding of the concepts presented.
exportIntroChat:
## About this document

This document contains AI study conversations related to the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (SAA-C03)** certification.

### Purpose
Records discussions and explanations generated during interactive AI study sessions, serving as complementary reference material.

domains.name: Design Secure Architectures
domains.description: Domain 1 (30%): Design secure access to AWS resources, design secure workloads and applications, determine appropriate data security controls.

domains.name: Design Resilient Architectures
domains.description: Domain 2 (26%): Design scalable and loosely coupled architectures, design highly available and fault-tolerant architectures.

domains.name: Design High-Performing Architectures
domains.description: Domain 3 (24%): Determine high-performing and scalable storage solutions, design high-performing and elastic compute solutions, determine high-performing database and networking solutions.

domains.name: Design Cost-Optimized Architectures
domains.description: Domain 4 (20%): Design cost-optimized storage, compute, database, and network architectures.
